# Strava Utilities Project - Copilot Instructions

This workspace contains utilities and tools for working with Strava data and API.

## Project Overview
- **Type**: Python-based Strava utilities
- **Purpose**: API integration, activity analysis, reporting tools
- **Framework**: Python with data science libraries
- **Target**: Strava athletes and coaches

## Development Guidelines
- Use Python 3.8+ with modern syntax
- Follow PEP 8 coding standards
- Implement proper error handling for API calls
- Use environment variables for sensitive data (API tokens)
- Include comprehensive documentation and examples

## Key Components
- Strava API integration
- Activity data analysis
- Reporting and visualization tools
- Utility scripts for common tasks
- Authentication and token management

## Setup Complete ✅
All project components have been successfully created and configured:
- Python virtual environment configured
- Core modules implemented (client, auth, analysis)
- Example scripts created
- Dependencies installed
- VS Code tasks configured
- Documentation completed
